binding.failed: Account imported, but group/proxy binding failed

batch.placeholder:
Auto-detects any of:
· a single token JSON (cpa format): {"access_token": "...", "refresh_token": "..."}
· a JSON array of accounts: [{...}, {...}]
· card-key rows (one per line): email----password----RefreshToken----ClientId----ClientSecret----provider
batch.placeholderCursor:
Auto-detects any of (one per line, batchable):
· a Cursor Access Token (JWT): eyJhbGciOi...
· a session token: user_xxx::eyJhbGciOi... (WorkosCursorSessionToken, %3A%3A-encoded ok)
· a single token JSON: {"access_token": "...", "refresh_token": "..."}
· a JSON array: [{...}, {...}]
batch.hint: Entries are counted automatically and imported one by one; card-key delimiters: ---- / Tab / 2+ spaces, lines starting with # are ignored.
batch.hintCursor: Paste a raw JWT or a user_xxx::token session string, one per line for batch import; lines starting with # are ignored. A JWT-only paste has no refresh token, so re-import once it expires.
batch.empty: No valid credentials parsed — check the format
